name: Commercial Loan Direct
description_short: Commercial Loan Direct specializes in commercial loans and multifamily mortgages for real estate investors and business owners seeking capital for property acquisition and expansion.
description_long: Commercial Loan Direct operates in the commercial real estate financing space, providing lending solutions specifically tailored to business owners and real estate investors. The company focuses on two primary loan categories: commercial loans for general business purposes and multifamily mortgages for residential investment properties with multiple units. Their website indicates they serve clients who need capital for acquiring, refinancing, or expanding commercial real estate assets. The company emphasizes accessibility through multiple contact channels including phone, email, chat, and web-based inquiry systems, suggesting a customer-service-oriented approach to loan origination. Commercial Loan Direct positions itself within the broader commercial real estate lending market, competing with traditional banks, portfolio lenders, and specialized commercial mortgage brokers. The availability of multifamily mortgage products indicates they cater to a specific segment of real estate investors focused on apartment complexes and multi-unit residential properties. However, the website content provided contains primarily design elements and contact icons rather than detailed loan terms, rates, or specific product features. This limits transparency about their actual loan products, underwriting criteria, pricing structure, and company background. Prospective borrowers would need to contact the company directly to obtain specifics about loan amounts, interest rates, processing timelines, and eligibility requirements. For investors in commercial real estate seeking multifamily financing or general business capital, Commercial Loan Direct may offer a streamlined application process through their multiple communication channels. However, lack of publicly available loan details on their website makes comparison shopping difficult.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple contact channels available (phone, email, chat, web inquiry) for convenient borrowing experience
Specializes in multifamily mortgages, addressing a specific underserved niche in real estate lending
Offers both commercial loans and multifamily mortgage products under one lender
Website indicates dedicated customer support infrastructure
cons: Website provides no publicly available information about loan terms, rates, APRs, or pricing
No details on minimum/maximum loan amounts, loan-to-value ratios, or credit requirements
No information about processing times, funding timelines, or loan approval rates
Minimal company background, history, or credentials visible on website
Unclear whether company operates as direct lender, broker, or correspondent lender
best_for: Real estate investors seeking multifamily property mortgages
Commercial business owners needing capital for expansion or acquisition
Borrowers who prefer direct contact channels over online application processes
diagnosis: Commercial Loan Direct targets real estate investors and commercial business owners seeking multifamily mortgages and commercial financing. The main caveat is that the company provides almost no publicly available loan terms, rates, or product details on their website, requiring direct contact to evaluate whether their offerings are competitive or suitable.
services: Multifamily mortgages for residential investment properties
Live chat support for initial inquiries
Web-based loan application and quote requests
Customer support infrastructure for loan servicing
Real estate lending for property acquisition
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 611 Gateway Blvd Ste 120, South San Francisco, CA 94080
